arts.ttl: Crystal Palace closely monitoring promising striker with 27 goals and 11 assists
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are already preparing for the summer transfer window, with Midtjylland striker Franculino Dju emerging as a prime target to bolster their attacking arsenal. As the Eagles look to regroup after a demanding Premier League campaign, securing young and promising talent has become a clear priority. arts.ttl: Fulham star not a priority for club as Arsenal man pushed to front of transfer planning queue
arts.sum: Fulham star Andreas Pereira is not a priority for Flamengo at this moment in time, as they’re focused on finalising a deal to sign Arsenal’s Jorginho. That’s according to Gazeta do Urubu, who say the Mengão board are fully focused on signing the Arsenal man despite the rumours around the Fulham midfielder.
